name: Don't Vex a Mom!
overview: An 18-year-old girl is about to enter university. The incident occurs when her sister has an accident, causing her not only to lose her home but also to adopt a new baby born to her sister.

trailers.title: ĐỪNG LÀM MẸ CÁU | OFFICIAL TRAILER | 1.12.2022 | MỘT KHOÁ HỌC LÀM MẸ ĐẦY KHÓ KHĂN VÀ SỰ THIẾU THỐN
